overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt traversing a dark, foggy forest at night, transitioning from open grassland to dense woods and finally to a misty marsh with water pools and wooden fences. The atmosphere is consistently moody with blue-teal lighting and atmospheric mist throughout the journey.

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily through open grassland toward the forest edge, with two swords visible on his back

entered.detail: rolling green hills with patches of tall grass
scattered deciduous trees with autumn foliage
misty mountain silhouette visible on the horizon
narrow winding dirt trail through the grass

segments.scene_description: Geralt moves through open grassland with scattered trees lining the right side, approaching the dark forest edge under a hazy night sky. The terrain is uneven with rolling hills, and a narrow dirt path winds through the center of the frame toward the distant tree line.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense dark forest interior with thick canopy

events.description: entering the dense forest canopy significantly reduces ambient light

agents.ego_description: Geralt navigating through the dense, dark forest with tall trees surrounding the narrow path ahead

entered.detail: tall trees with thick trunks forming a dark wall ahead
dense bushes and low vegetation lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the dense forest where visibility drops significantly due to darkness and thick tree cover. The path narrows as it winds between tall trees with thick undergrowth on either side, creating an enclosed, claustrophobic atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty marsh with standing water and wooden fences

events.description: screen briefly goes dark as character passes through dense thicket or transition
emerging from forest into open marsh area with visible water pools

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking along a narrow path through the misty marsh, passing wooden fence posts and pools of water on both sides

entered.detail: standing water pools reflecting the dim light alongside the path
weathered wooden posts and broken fencing lining the marsh path
distinctive red-leaved bushes glowing in the dim light

segments.scene_description: After a brief occlusion, the scene opens into a misty marsh with standing water pools visible on both sides of the path. Weathered wooden fence posts and distinctive red foliage line the route as Geralt continues forward through the foggy wetland environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, hazy grassland into the suffocating depths of a dark forest. It begins by tracking Geralt across uneven rolling hills and a winding dirt path, with scattered trees lining the right side under a dim night sky. As the character approaches the distant tree line, the open terrain gradually gives way to a dense canopy that swallows the remaining light. The scene then shifts into a claustrophobic environment where visibility drops significantly, and the path narrows as it weaves between towering trees and thick undergrowth.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moody, atmospheric wetland characterized by dense mist and stagnant water. It begins as the view clears from a brief occlusion, revealing a path cutting through a misty marsh. As the camera moves forward, standing water pools emerge on both sides of the route, blending into the foggy environment. The scene then expands to show weathered wooden fence posts and distinctive red foliage lining the way before the camera continues its steady progression deeper into the wetland.
